description: anvilml-core: job types (Job, JobStatus, JobSettings, SubmitJobRequest/Response)
context: Create crates/anvilml-core/src/types/job.rs per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.3: Job{id:Uuid,status:JobStatus,graph:Value,settings:JobSettings,created_at,started_at,completed_at,worker_id,error,queue_position}, JobStatus enum(Queued/Running/Completed/Failed/Cancelled), JobSettings{device_preference:Option<String>}, SubmitJobRequest{graph:Value,settings:JobSettings}, SubmitJobResponse{job_id:Uuid,queue_position:u32}. Derive Serialize+Deserialize+Clone+Debug+ToSchema. cargo test -p anvilml-core -- types::job exits 0 >=3 tests.

Create types/model.rs: ModelMeta{id:String,name,path:PathBuf,kind:ModelKind,dtype:ModelDtype,format:ModelFormat,size_bytes:u64,scanned_at:DateTime<Utc>}, ModelKind(Diffusion/TextEncoder/Vae/Lora/ControlNet/Upscale/Unknown), ModelDtype(Fp32/Fp16/Bf16/Fp8/Fp4/Unknown), ModelFormat(Safetensors/Ckpt/Pt/Bin/Unknown). Create types/artifact.rs: ArtifactMeta{id,job_id,hash,path,size_bytes,created_at}. All serde snake_case. cargo test -p anvilml-core -- types::model exits 0 >=3 tests.

Create types/hardware.rs per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.5: HardwareInfo{host:HostInfo,gpus:Vec<GpuDevice>,inference_caps:InferenceCaps}, GpuDevice{index,name,device_type:DeviceType,vram_total_mib,vram_free_mib,driver_version,pci_vendor_id,pci_device_id,arch:Option<String>,caps:InferenceCaps,enumeration_source,capabilities_source}, DeviceType{Cuda/Rocm/Cpu}, InferenceCaps{fp32,fp16,bf16,fp8,fp4,flash_attention:bool}, EnumerationSource, CapabilitySource. cargo test -p anvilml-core -- types::hardware exits 0 >=4 tests.

Create types/node.rs: NodeTypeDescriptor{type_name,display_name,category,inputs/outputs:Vec<SlotDescriptor>}, SlotDescriptor{name,slot_type,optional}, SlotType enum(Model/Clip/Vae/Conditioning/Latent/Image/String/Int/Float/Bool/Any). Create types/worker.rs: WorkerInfo, WorkerStatus(Initializing/Idle/Busy/Dead/Respawning), EnvReport{python_path,python_version,torch_version,provisioning,preflight_ok,reason,node_types}, ProvisioningState(Ready/Provisioning/Failed/NotStarted). All field names per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.6-5.7. cargo test -p anvilml-core exits 0 >=3 tests each.

description: anvilml-core: WsEvent enum with all variant subtypes
context: Create types/events.rs per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.8: WsEvent #[serde(tag="type",rename_all="snake_case")] with variants JobQueued/JobStarted/JobProgress/JobImageReady/JobCompleted/JobFailed/JobCancelled/WorkerStatusChanged/SystemStats/ProvisioningProgress and their fields. Update types/mod.rs to re-export all type modules. cargo test -p anvilml-core -- types::events exits 0 >=4 tests (roundtrip, tag field in JSON).

description: anvilml-core: AnvilError enum with IntoResponse for axum
context: Create crates/anvilml-core/src/error.rs: AnvilError per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §5.2 (Db/Io/Serde/Ipc/PayloadTooLarge/WorkerNotFound/JobNotFound/InvalidGraph/CycleDetected/ModelNotFound/WorkersUnavailable/Internal). Derive thiserror::Error. Implement IntoResponse: map each variant to HTTP status + JSON {error,message,request_id:Uuid}. Add thiserror+uuid as workspace deps. cargo test -p anvilml-core -- error exits 0.

description: anvilml-server: stub GET /v1/system/env returning default EnvReport
context: Create crates/anvilml-server/src/handlers/system.rs: async fn get_env(State(state):State<AppState>)->Json<EnvReport> returning EnvReport::default(). Add AppState field env_report:Arc<RwLock<EnvReport>>. Mount GET /v1/system/env in build_router. Add anvilml-core dep to anvilml-server. curl /v1/system/env -> 200 {preflight_ok:false,provisioning:"NotStarted"}.

description: backend: config_reference drift guard integration test
context: Create backend/tests/config_reference.rs: serialise ServerConfig::default() to TOML via toml::to_string_pretty, parse both strings to BTreeMap, recursively compare key sets — fail if any key present in one but absent in other. Create anvilml.toml at repo root with all config keys at documented defaults per ENVIRONMENT.md §4. Add toml as dev-dep to backend. cargo test -p backend --features mock-hardware -- config_reference exits 0.
